requirements.text: Discuss with your counselor the history of auctions worldwide. Cite where these auctions were held and the types of items sold.

children.value: Discuss with your counselor the history of auctions worldwide. Cite where these auctions were held and the types of items sold.

requirements.text: Describe to your counselor the different roles in an auction.

children.value: Describe to your counselor the different roles in an auction.

requirements.text: Describe to your counselor the differences and similarities between the auction method and the traditional method of sales.

children.value: Describe to your counselor the differences and similarities between the auction method and the traditional method of sales.

requirements.text: With permission from your parents or Guardian, contact a professional auctioneer and record an interview with the auctioneer that lasts approximately 5 to 10 minutes. Do one of the following:

children.value: With permission from your parents or Guardian, contact a professional auctioneer and record an interview with the auctioneer that lasts approximately 5 to 10 minutes. Do one of the following:

sub_requirements.label: A
sub_requirements.text: Shadow that auctioneer for a day and discuss with your counselor what you learned about auctioneering and being an auctioneer.

content.value: Shadow that auctioneer for a day and discuss with your counselor what you learned about auctioneering and being an auctioneer.

sub_requirements.label: B
sub_requirements.text: Attend a live auction of any type. Take notes on what is occurring during the auction and how the auctioneer interacts with the bidders, and discuss them with your counselor.

content.value: Attend a live auction of any type. Take notes on what is occurring during the auction and how the auctioneer interacts with the bidders, and discuss them with your counselor.

sub_requirements.label: C
sub_requirements.text: View an online auction until the sale is concluded and discuss it with your counselor.

content.value: View an online auction until the sale is concluded and discuss it with your counselor.

sub_requirements.label: A
sub_requirements.text: Types of assets sold at auction

content.value: Types of assets sold at auction

sub_requirements.label: B
sub_requirements.text: Types of customers you would be selling these assets for

content.value: Types of customers you would be selling these assets for

sub_requirements.label: C
sub_requirements.text: List the types of auction formats and the benefits of each and why an auctioneer might sell something through an online auction versus a live auction versus a simulcast auction

content.value: List the types of auction formats and the benefits of each and why an auctioneer might sell something through an online auction versus a live auction versus a simulcast auction

requirements.text: Develop and practice your auction chant. Perform the auction chant for your counselor and at a unit meeting.

children.value: Develop and practice your auction chant. Perform the auction chant for your counselor and at a unit meeting.

requirements.text: Plan a simple live or online auction at your unit meeting and document the steps from start to finish.

children.value: Plan a simple live or online auction at your unit meeting and document the steps from start to finish.
